pages.raw_text:
Ping Cling. the 17-year-old Chinese
boy who was held on the charge of
being an illegal resident of this coun-
try. was yesterday discharged by
United States Commissioner Mar
shall.


All the details have now been COM
pleted for the erection of the Pan
handle Smelling & Refining company s
smelter at Standpoint, idaho. Plans
are being drawn and the work of ex-
eavating will soon begin.


Members Of the Woman's Exchange
met at the parish house of All Saints
cathedral yesterday and decided to
carry out the plan of selling the prop
erty. The proceeds will be devoted to
the welfare of the MONDAY Rest.


The county commissioners yester-
day afternoon awarded the contract
of staining and vanishing the wood
work and kalsomining the walls OF
the offices of the courthouse to Har.
vey & Carpentar. Two bids were
offered by the firm, but 1t has not yet
been decided which bid will be agreed
upon.
